original_image_tags: A pink carbon copy of a typewritten document. The paper shows signs of age with some discoloration and two punch holes at the bottom. A large circular stamp is prominently visible in the upper right quadrant.
A circular ink stamp with a date wheel.
At the bottom of the page, below the main text block, are three lines of typed text, likely part of a signature block or file notation, which are also very faded.

elements.description: A circular ink stamp with a dial-like outer ring. The center text reads 'DISPATCHED OCT 1948 REGISTERED UNIT MATS'. The outer ring has numbers 1 through 12 arranged clockwise. Two dark ink blotches are visible near the bottom edge of the page.

judge.reason: Description B claims a circular stamp has specific center text ('DISPATCHED OCT 1948...') and a numbered outer ring, while Description A only notes a 'large circular stamp' with a 'date wheel' and provides no readable text, creating a direct contradiction on the verbatim content of a key visual element.
